passiveAbilities.name: arhammer
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Slicing or Piercing Melee Dmg, reduce the Dmg to W. If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +2.

passiveAbilities.name: Plate Armour
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all non-Magical Dmg suffered by -2.

passiveAbilities.name: Ornithophobia
passiveAbilities.description: Whenever a Goblin character ends a move engaged by this model, for the first time this turn, it must discard 1 energy, if able.

passiveAbilities.name: The Governor
passiveAbilities.description: Friendly Soldiers within 6” gain +1 Melee stat.

activeAbilities.name: Yell Out Commands
activeAbilities.description: Move target friendly non-Noble 1”. If the target is a friendly Soldier move it 2” instead. You may only target each character once per turn.

signatureMove.name: Knee Smasher
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy suffered 1 or more Wds during this round of Melee then it cannot take a Jog action until end of turn.
